positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette, stylized in a continuous line art style, rendered in deep navy blue and warm mustard yellow, set against a plain cream background. The design must feature clean, bold shapes with negative space, designed to wrap around a piece of clothing. Perfect for large format apparel printing. Composition should be centrally focused and balanced. Studio lighting, high contrast, vector art aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, watermark, text, logo, signature, complex background, extra details, noisy, poor anatomy, artifacts
